title: Infinite Scrolling
subtitle: Event loop deep dive, Intersection Observer, pagination, and lazy loading
prerequisites: day08 — fetch, loading/error states, useEffect cleanup
day09 — paginated API types and debouncing
day10 — list rendering, keys, and product models
expectedOutcome: Explain event loop, microtasks, and macrotasks in interview terms
Implement infinite scroll with Intersection Observer API
Auto-load pages with loading indicator, end message, and retry
Clean up observers on unmount to prevent memory leaks
definitionOfDone: Scrolling near bottom automatically loads next page
End-of-list message when no more pages
No duplicate items or infinite render loops

tomorrowPreview.title: Shopping Cart
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow you will manage application-wide cart state with Context API and the reducer pattern — adding immutability discipline to everything you built this week.
